model_information.description: Population PKPD model for Eplontersen (ARO-TTR02), an antisense oligonucleotide (ASO) targeting transthyretin. Features 2-compartment PK with subcutaneous absorption and TTR biomarker indirect response model with Emax inhibition of TTR synthesis.
model_information.author: Jane Knochel
model_information.applications: Dose-selection, clinical trial simulation, PKPD modeling, TTR lowering prediction, patient stratification
